order_id.business_reasoning: Order IDs are required to trace deliveries and must never be invented.
order_id.risk_assessment: Low when the affected row count is small; otherwise investigate the source system.

delivery_minutes.business_reasoning: The median represents a typical delivery and is resistant to unusually long deliveries that could skew the mean.
delivery_minutes.risk_assessment: Medium because the filled value is synthetic and must be excluded or flagged in sensitive KPI analysis.

distance_km.business_reasoning: Route distance is needed for route-efficiency analysis; the median limits the influence of unusually long routes.
distance_km.risk_assessment: Medium; imputed distances are flagged for downstream users.

zone.business_reasoning: Zone is required for hotspot reporting; the most common observed zone is the least disruptive categorical fallback.
zone.risk_assessment: Medium because an unknown order may not actually belong to the most common zone.

rider_delay_minutes.business_reasoning: A missing rider attribution means the cause was not recorded. Filling it would falsely assign responsibility and distort rider performance metrics.
rider_delay_minutes.risk_assessment: Low for data integrity; downstream rider metrics must report the unresolved count.
